title: Runtime clear action differs from documented intended reset behavior

desiredRefs.title: Clear Filters resets active browse filters

mappingRefs.title: Observed modal clear behavior maps to desired active reset behavior

summary: Observed runtime scope for Clear Filters is narrower than documented intended behavior.
observedRuntimeSummary: The action clears local modal controls without proving active browse constraints are reset.
documentedCurrentSummary: The prior current UX row suggested the clear action represented reset behavior.
intendedOrDesiredSummary: Desired UX expects visible active browse filter reset after confirmation.

recommendation.summary: Record observed runtime and decide whether to align runtime to desired reset behavior.
recommendation.rationaleMd: The mismatch is user-visible but non-blocking for unrelated clear work.

alternatives.summary: Update UX intent to match modal-local clear behavior.
alternatives.tradeoffsMd: Avoids runtime change but keeps a potentially misleading label.

recommendation.consequencesMd: Closeout should surface this to the user.

followUp.nextStep: Ask user whether runtime should align to desired reset behavior or UX intent should be updated.

implementationGate.reason: Non-blocking drift recorded for user decision after current work.

confirmationBaseline.notesMd: Backfilled as the audit baseline for the one-pass UX spec creation/update. This records provenance only; it does not replace UX authority, product confirmation, behavior mappings, or runtime drift ledgers.
